name: aurora-terminal-block
title: Aurora Terminal Block
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native terminal with 38px navy titlebar (Labby mark, session name, status dot, kill/clear/run buttons), full color system using Aurora tokens, compact in-chat variant, and blinking cursor.
docs:
Aurora block that installs Aurora Terminal.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/terminal.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-components`.
